title: Autopilot — autonomous faceless-video business
label: autopilot-faceless
purpose: A self-running content factory (concept -> collection -> advertising -> feedback) on top of the Remotion faceless video generator, designed to run unattended with no human in the loop and monetize via affiliate + ad/creator revenue + productized client service + build-and-flip.
why_now: Fritz asked for a money-generating system built from the faceless video generator, fully autonomous, with agents and everything needed to run it, and explicitly 'I shouldn't be involved.' Operator inputs locked 2026-06-02: publish to YouTube Shorts + TikTok + Instagram Reels, all four money models, $5/day hard spend cap, auto-discover niches by ROI.

origin.trigger_record: Session 2026-06-02 — 'I need money. figure it out by morning' + faceless generator + 'fully autonomous' rollout
origin.summary: Built the faceless generator first, then the autopilot orchestration layer on top, reusing FAMtastic infra (data-center ledgers, run-health, vault) per codebase recon.

success_signal: (1) `node autopilot/cli.mjs tick` runs concept->collection->advertising->feedback unattended. (2) Hard $5/day budget governor + kill switch + dry-run-unless-live governance enforced. (3) Learning loop updates niche weights from performance. (4) On credentials + live=true, publishing flips from staged to live with no code change. (5) Tests pass.
non_goals: Violating platform ToS (official APIs only; no fake engagement)
Spending beyond the configured daily cap
Publishing without explicit credentials + live flag

workstreams.title: Phase 0 — foundation (ledgers, budget governor, governance, orchestrator, CLI, tests)
Phase 1 — concept engine (ROI bandit + dedupe + niche portfolio)
Phase 2 — collection engine (faceless gen + QA + SEO + affiliate + render)
Phase 4 — feedback loop (metrics -> niche weights -> learnings)
Phase 3.5 — wire live platform uploads (YouTube/TikTok/Instagram official APIs)
acceptance: With creds + live=true, a video actually uploads and a permalink is logged

workstreams.title: Phase 4.5 — real analytics ingestion (replace simulated metrics)
Phase 2.5 — AI b-roll + thumbnail generation via media-studio buildMuapiPlan
Phase 5a — client-upsell agent (promos + draft offer emails for existing site clients)
acceptance: Generates branded promo + staged offer email
Verified against site-mbsh-reunion with a real rendered MP4

workstreams.title: Phase 5b — build-and-flip channel-growth tracker
acceptance: Channel growth tracked toward sale thresholds

workstreams.title: Phase 5a.1 — live client email send (Resend)
acceptance: Sends only when live + key + recipient, else stages; never throws
Live path proven to execute + fail safe with a fake key

workstreams.title: Phase 6 — hardening (cron in prod, circuit breakers, dashboard, post-eval)
